channel.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Jul 15th, 2020
item.description:
Modules

  • mutex-serverstars20 - Critical section controllers, like mutex and semaphore, in the network level.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Jul 6th, 2018
item.description:
Modules

  • rpc-websocketsstars360 - JSON-RPC 2.0 implementation over WebSockets for Node.js and JavaScript.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Aug 27th, 2017
item.description:
High level

  • instant.iostars2.8k – Streaming file transfer over WebTorrent.
  • webtorrentstars23.7k – BitTorrent over WebRTC.
  • hypervisionstars436 – P2P Television.

    • Modules

  • magnet-uristars183 – Parse a magnet URI and return an object of keys/values.
  • torrent-discoverystars178 – Discover BitTorrent and WebTorrent peers.
  • airplay-serverstars246 – A low level AirPlay server.
  • castnowstars96 – simple chromecast player.
  • discovery-swarmstars359 – A network swarm that uses discovery-channelstars294 to find peers. Also check webrtc-swarmstars346.
  • dns-packetstars113 – Abstract-encoding compliant module for encoding / decoding DNS packets. Also see dns-socketstars92.
  • etcdjsstars58 – Low level etcd v2 client written in Javascript with failover support.
  • geocode-wifistars26 – Get yours latitude/longitude based on your wifi access point.
  • hash-to-portstars33 – Hash a value to a valid port.
  • hyperdbstars727 – Distributed scalable database.
  • ip-packetstars37 – Encode/decode raw ip packets.
  • network-addressstars63 – Get the local network address of your machine.
  • network-simulatorstars37 – Simulate a low-level computer network.
  • rtsp-streamstars75 - A transport agnostic RTSP serial multiplexer module for Node.
  • simple-peerstars5.4k – Simple WebRTC video/voice and data channels.
  • simple-websocketstars161 – Simple, EventEmitter API for WebSockets.
  • torrent-streamstars1.8k – The low level streaming torrent engine that peerflix uses.
  • udp-packetstars44 – Encode/decode raw udp packets.

    • Protocols

  • bittorrent-dhtstars1k – BitTorrent DHT protocol implementation.
  • bittorrent-protocolstars281 – BitTorrent peer wire protocol implementation.
  • bittorrent-trackerstars1.2k – BitTorrent tracker (client & server) implementation

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Mar 1st, 2017
item.description:
Protocols

  • dns-discoverystars185 – Discovery peers in a distributed system using regular dns and multicast dns.
  • dht-rpcstars117 – Make RPC calls over a Kademlia based DHT.

    • High level

  • gunstars12.9k – A realtime, decentralized, offline-first, graph database engine.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Dec 18th, 2016
item.description:
High level

  • hyperpipestars115 – Distributed input/output pipe.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Feb 29th, 2016
item.description:
High level

  • peercaststars476 – Like peerflix but for Chromecast.
  • peerflixstars5.6k – Streaming torrent client.
  • peervisionarystars43 – Stream p2p content over your local network.
  • peerwikistars307 – browse all of wikipedia using bittorrent.
  • screencatstars2.9k – WebRTC screensharing app.
  • signalhubstars611 – Simple signalling server that can be used to coordinate handshaking with webrtc or other fun stuff.
  • torrent-mountstars1.2k – Mount a torrent (or magnet link) as a filesystem in real time using torrent-stream and fuse.
  • webcatstars420 – pipe across the web using WebRTC.
  • websocketdstars15.4k – Turn any program that uses stdin/stdout into a WebSocket server.

    • Protocols

  • castv2stars697 – An implementation of the Chromecast CASTV2 protocol.
  • ipfsstars1k – The InterPlanetary File System, a new peer-to-peer hypermedia protocol.
  • k-bucketstars139 – Kademlia DHT K-bucket implementation as a binary tree.
  • k-rpcstars76 – Implementation of the k-rpc protocol used the BitTorrent DHT. Also see k-rpc-socketstars20.
  • mdnsstars802 – mdns/zeroconf/bonjour service discovery.
  • multicast-dnsstars399 – Low level multicast-dns implementation.
  • peervisionstars96 – Live p2p streaming protocol.
  • polostars244 – A zero configuration service discovery module.
  • rtsp-serverstars26 – A low level module for creating RTSP servers.
  • utp-nativestars91 – micro transport protocol, a network protocol similar to tcp that runs on top of udp.
  • hypercorestars1.8k – A p2p network for distributing and replicating static feeds of binary data.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Jan 11th, 2016
item.description:
High level

  • dhtkvstars60 – CLI for storing arbitrary key/value data in the bittorrent mainline DHT.
  • ipp-printerstars462 – Create a printer on your network.
  • wifi-triangulatestars67 – Finds your current position on planet earth using the wifi access point.
  • deejaystars122 – Music player that broadcasts to everyone on the same network.

    • Protocols

  • bonjourstars531 – A Bonjour/Zeroconf protocol implementation.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Oct 12th, 2015
item.description:
High level

  • blecatstars94 – 1-1 pipe over bluetooth low energy.
  • airpastestars787 – 1-1 network pipe that auto discovers other peers using mdns.

item.title: Kikobeats/awesome-network-js Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Protocols

  • airswarmstars122 – Network swarm that automagically discovers other peers on the network using multicast dns.
